---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve EcoGuide AI
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 126, Safari 17]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g. 20.x]
- **EcoGuide AI version**: [e.g. v1.0.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Accessibility Impact

Does this bug affect keyboard navigation, screen readers, or other assistive technologies? If so, please describe.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have included all relevant information above
- [ ] I have attached screenshots or recordings where helpful
